phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Vucciria market is like now
phrases.text_local: Scusi, il mercato della Vucciria è ancora attivo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eel mer-KAH-toh DEL-lah voot-CHEE-ryah eh an-KOH-rah at-TEE-voh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Vucciria was once Palermo's largest market; today the stalls are minimal but it transforms into a lively street bar scene by evening.

responses.english: In the day not much, in the evening it fills up.
responses.phonetic: dee JOR-noh POH-koh, dee SEH-rah eh PYEH-noh dee JEN-teh.
responses.french: Di giorno poco, di sera è pieno di gente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find street food in the Vucciria
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trovano i venditori di street food alla Vucciria?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see troh-VAH-noh ee ven-dee-toh-REE dee street food AL-lah voot-CHEE-ryah?

responses.english: In the centre of the square, near the fountain.
responses.phonetic: al CHEN-troh DEL-lah PYAHT-tsah, vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah fon-TAH-nah.
responses.french: Al centro della piazza, vicino alla fontana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the evening scene starts
phrases.text_local: Scusi, da che ora si anima la Vucciria di sera?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, dah keh OH-rah see ah-NEE-mah lah voot-CHEE-ryah dee SEH-rah?

responses.english: From 8 pm onwards, until late at night.
responses.phonetic: DAL-leh VEN-tee een poi, FEE-noh ah NOT-teh FON-dah.
responses.french: Dalle venti in poi, fino a notte fonda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the Vucciria from the Quattro Canti
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva alla Vucciria dai Quattro Canti?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah AL-lah voot-CHEE-ryah dai KWAT-troh KAN-tee?

responses.english: Toward the sea along Via Roma, then left.
responses.phonetic: VER-soh eel MAH-reh per VEE-ah ROH-mah, poi ah see-NEES-trah.
responses.french: Verso il mare per Via Roma, poi a sinistra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the neighbourhood's famous painting shows
phrases.text_local: Scusi, cosa rappresenta il famoso dipinto della Vucciria?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-zah rap-preh-zen-TAH eel fah-MOH-zoh dee-PEEN-toh DEL-lah voot-CHEE-ryah?
phrases.cultural_note: Renato Guttuso's 1974 painting La Vucciria is one of modern Italy's most iconic works, showing the market in full life.

responses.english: The market at its peak in the 1970s.
responses.phonetic: eel mer-KAH-toh nel SOO-oh PYEH-noh fer-VOH-reh DEL-lyee AN-nee set-TAN-tah.
responses.french: Il mercato nel suo pieno fervore degli anni '70.
